# InfraCost

> You ship fast. Infrastructure debt accumulates faster.

InfraCost is a self-hosted dashboard that tracks infrastructure spending across 12 cloud and AI platforms. Built for vibecoders and indie builders who accumulate services faster than they track them — Render, Railway, Neon, Turso, Claude Max, Resend and more pile up while free tiers expire silently and budgets drift. InfraCost pulls live costs every morning, alerts before overspending, and counts down every free tier, credit, domain renewal and SSL expiry in one urgency-sorted view.

## Key Features

- **All 12 Platforms in One Pull**: API collectors for Render, Railway, Anthropic, Claude Max, Neon, Turso, Resend, UptimeRobot, GCP, GitHub, Google Services, Websupport
- **Alerts Before the Spike Hits**: Threshold alerts (50-100%) + anomaly detection for spending spikes. Email and WhatsApp notifications.
- **Free Tier Expiry Countdown**: Credits, plan limits, domain renewals, SSL expirations, and free tier deadlines — urgency-sorted with risk badges
- **Drift Detection + GitHub Discovery**: Compares live API service inventories against tracked records daily. Auto-discovers untracked GitHub repos with deployment indicators.
- **Project Analytics**: GA4 traffic + Google Search Console performance per project with SEO scoring
- **Domain and SSL Renewals**: 21 domain/hosting/SSL renewals tracked with countdown timers
- **Weekly Digest**: Automated Monday email with MTD spend, budget %, active alerts, manual reminders
- **Autonomous Health Checks**: Weekly scheduled agent audits project registry against GitHub repos
- **Dual Currency**: All amounts shown in both USD and EUR

## Tech Stack

- Nuxt 4 (Vue 3) + Nuxt UI v4 + Tailwind CSS v4
- Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL (Railway)
- Google OAuth for authentication
- Daily cron collection at 06:00 UTC
- 213 tests across 16 files

## Pages

- `/` — Problem-first landing page + authenticated cost dashboard
- `/breakdown` — Per-service cost breakdown (by platform or by project)
- `/trends` — Monthly cost trends with MoM comparison
- `/optimizations` — Cost optimization suggestions
- `/countdown` — Credits + limits + domain/SSL expiry countdown
- `/alerts` — Filterable alert history with bulk actions
- `/analytics` — GA4 traffic + GSC search performance per project
- `/status` — UptimeRobot monitors + project registry + drift detection
- `/platforms` — Platform cards with API status, freshness, account info
- `/budgets` — Budget management and threshold configuration
- `/manual` — Manual cost entry for non-API platforms

## URL

https://infracost.eu

## Source

https://github.com/peter-fusek/infracost
